calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Vacating Entry Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mitchell L. Wong, Esq. of The Law Offices of Mitchell Wong, 650.204.0620, specially appearing for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN COUNTRY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING ENTRY OF DISMISSAL.

There being no appearance by any other party, the tentative ruling is adopted: Plaintiff American Country Insurance Company's moton for order vacating entry of dismissal is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. Plaintiff has not filed a proof of service showing that defendants were served with the motion papers. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Roger E. Jackson, Esq., specially appearing for Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of counsel for Plaintiff. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
